title: The corn market in 2026 is characterised by well-supplied conditions
section_path: The corn market in 2026 is characterised by well-supplied conditions
section_path_text: The corn market in 2026 is characterised by well-supplied conditions
summary:
Main
By Nikolaos Tagoulis
The corn market in 2026 is characterised by well-supplied conditions, due to strong harvests across the Americas and elevated U.S. While this pricing environment bolsters consumption, it compresses producer margins. At the same time, cost-side pressures are intensifying.
